nasb.text: and Aaron spoke all the words which the Lord had spoken to Moses. He then performed the signs in the sight of the people.

esv.text: Aaron spoke all the words that the Lord had spoken to Moses and did the signs in the sight of the people.

cnv.text: 亞倫把耶和華對摩西所說的一切話都說了一遍，並且在人民的眼前行了這些神蹟。

ccb.text: 亚伦把耶和华对摩西的吩咐详细地告诉他们。摩西又在百姓面前行了那些神迹，
